back_translation: I, the church-elder, to the woman whom He has chosen and her children, those whom I love in the truth, and not only I alone but everyone who knows the truth also
Because of the truth that abides in us, and that will be with us forever
May grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father, and from Jesus Christ the Son of the Father, be with us in truth and in love
I am very glad that I have found some of your children walking in the truth, just as we have received the commandment from the Father
Now, I beg you, lady, not as one writing a new commandment to you, but as the commandment that we have had from the beginning, namely, let us love one another
And this is love, namely that we walk according to His commandments. This is the commandment, just as you all have heard from the beginning, that you all walk in love
Because many deceivers have gone out into the world, those who do not confess-and-receive that Jesus Christ has come in the flesh. That very one is the deceiver and the antichrist
Watch yourselves, so that you all do not lose what we have done, but you will receive a full reward
Everyone who advances-too-far and does not abide in the teaching of Christ does not have God. The one who abides in that teaching also has both the Father and the Son
If anyone comes to you, but does not bring this teaching, do not receive him into the house, and do not greet him
Because the one who greets him also shares in his evil deeds
I have many things to write to you all, but I do not want to use paper and ink. I hope that I will come to you and will speak face-to-face, so that the joy of you all may be filled-completely
The children of your sister whom He has chosen send greetings to you
